name: Passage: A Job Interview Simulator!
short_description: Navigate the corporate world in this narrative VN adventure with the help of your trusty cat (who just so happens to be a god!?) Battle wits with corporate bosses! Unlock multiple endings with 10+ hours of Visual Novel gameplay, answering the question: will you end up in the job of your dreams?
detailed_description:
What would you do if your pet cat transformed into an ancient Egyptian god?

In Passage: A Job Interview Simulator, take on the role of a destitute job-seeker, making tough decisions while you manage seeking a career in the hyper-competitive job market. Luckily, you’ve got your pet cat to help with work-life balance!

Passage includes a branching narrative spanning 8+ hours of gameplay, an original storyline, original character art, an immersive OST, and 5 unique endings!

JUMP INTO THE WORLD OF A GRADUATE JOBSEEKER



In Passage, you’re a recent college graduate desperately searching for a job. You’re plagued with constant nightmares about rejection - until, one day, your beloved cat comes to your aid! With his help, you’re able to start taking on the dark world of corporate interviews - these days, an interview can be the difference between life and death…

IMPRESS YOUR NEWFOUND CAT-GOD



Your newfound friend isn’t just useful for advice - they have unique powers to help you out, too! They’ll even stop time for you… better hope you impress them with your interview technique, though - there are only so many employers in the world.

UNCOVER DARK SECRETS



The world of corporate interviews can be dark - and many lose hope, but with our help you can succeed! Discover the truth about your prospective employers and your nightmares as you embark on your epic quest for employment.

Made jointly in Michigan and Washington.
